369 GG0170P2_PCKNG_UP_OBJ_GOAL_CD GG0170P2_PCKNG_UP_OBJ_GOAL_CD GG0170P2 Discharge Goal Pick up Object Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to be able to bend/stoop from a standing position to pick up a small object, such as a spoon from the floor. CHAR 2 The data
